 ## Strategy
-- Individual: Plan A ($19/T1), Plan B ($49/T2). Low tiers for margin.
-- Enterprise: Plan C ($89/T5). Target D_E02 and D_E09.
-- Targeted Dev Spend: $300/day for D_E02, $300/day for D_E09. Focus on B2B.
-- Quotas: A=2000, B=6000, C=25000 to fix "quota wall" complaints.
+- Individual: Plan A ($19/T1), Plan B ($49/T2).
+- Enterprise: Plan C ($69/T5) - Lowered from $89 due to PMI 45.6 contraction.
+- Quotas: A=5000, B=15000, C=50000. (Increased to stop "quota wall" complaints).
+- Ops Spend: $300/day. (Increased to clear support backlog).
+- Targeted Dev Spend: $300/day for D_E02, $300/day for D_E09. 
 - Ads: LinkedIn ($150 each for D_E02, D_E09), Search ($50 for S1).
-- Goal: Get Enterprise leads ASAP. Runway is ~5 weeks.
+- Promotion: 15% global lead promotion to counter economic downturn.
+- Goal: Secure first Enterprise deal. Runway is ~5 weeks at current burn.
 
 ## Metrics Tracking
-- Week 7: 65 subs ($59,746 cash). Burn ~$10.6k/week.
-- Quality: base 0.2 + global_bonus 0.1126 + D_E02 bonus 0.0031.
-- Plan C (T5) Quality: 0.3473 (Floor for D_E02 is 0.346).
-- PMI: 48.9 (declining).
+- Week 8: 71 subs ($49,394 cash). Burn ~$10.7k/week.
+- Quality: base 0.2 + global_bonus 0.1199 + D_E02 bonus 0.0123.
+- PMI: 45.6 (Contraction). Market is hesitant.
 
 ## Knowledge & Lessons
-- Price for Plan C was too high ($199) vs WTP ($70-90) for target enterprise groups.
-- Quotas (1200/4000) were still too low for power users.
-- next-week requires rationale + 12 cash forecasts as arguments.
+- "Quota wall" was still an issue at 2000/6000. Bumping to 5000/15000.
+- Support delays are hurting reputation. Increased Ops spend to $300.
+- next-week requires rationale as the first argument, then 12 forecast numbers.
 
 ## To Do
 - Watch for D_E02 and D_E09 enterprise leads.
-- If no leads by Week 9, must cut burn (ads/dev) to survive.
-- Check if higher quotas (2000/6000) finally stop the complaints.
+- If no leads by Week 10, MUST cut targeted dev spend ($600/day) to extend runway.
+- Check if support issues decrease.
